<?php namespace Spatie\Backup\Helpers; use Exception; use Illuminate\Contracts\Filesystem\Filesystem; class File { /** @var array<string> */ protected static array $allowedMimeTypes = [ 'application/zip', 'application/x-zip', 'application/x-gzip', ]; public function isZipFile(?Filesystem $disk, string $path): bool { if ($this->hasZipExtension($path)) { return true; } return $this->hasAllowedMimeType($disk, $path); } protected function hasZipExtension(string $path): bool { return pathinfo($path, PATHINFO_EXTENSION) === 'zip'; } protected function hasAllowedMimeType(?Filesystem $disk, string $path): bool { return in_array($this->mimeType($disk, $path), self::$allowedMimeTypes); } protected function mimeType(?Filesystem $disk, string $path): bool|string { try { if ($disk && method_exists($disk, 'mimeType')) { return $disk->mimeType($path) ?: false; } } catch (Exception) { // Some drivers throw exceptions when checking mime types, we'll // just fallback to `false`. } return false; } }
